title: Alada Sprite
description: "Sprite"  In her heyday, Sprite was a popular horse for our students to ride, and even jump. Now, she is retired from riding but continues to partner with people in student activities, classes, labs and other hands on engagements.

title: Cambria
description: "Minnie"  Minnie is a beautiful, dark bay, mare who was born and raised here at CPP. She has raised many of her own babies, and now plays an important role giving riding lessons to students and participating in our monthly Sunday Shows. Her conf

title: CP Bali Hai
description: "Bali"  Bali is very sweet and loves attention. She bonds closely with her horse friends, as well as humans. She is a great mom, and has raised two of her own babies to be confident and personable individuals. Today, she helps inspire the next g

title: CP Fascinator
description: CP Fascinator  Fascinator is a younger mare who truly loves people. She is in training under saddle to hopefully be in our Sunday Shows and student lesson program down the road. Her calm nature has made her a favorite among students and she alway

title: CP Heir About Her
description: "Felicity"  Felicity loves people and her calm energy makes her a perfect partner for many of our hands on-activities with horses here at the AHC. She was bred and born here, went on to become a successful show horse, and now has returned to us

title: CP Regal Belle
description: "Belle"  Belle is a bay mare with white star and snip face markings. She is a patient and kind teacher and she loves her people. Belle is a big part of our Horses for Heroes program where the Arabian Horse Center partners with the Veterans Resou

title: Pistol
description: Pistol  Pistol was a champion show horse in the trail and reining divisions in her heyday. Now, she lives with her best (horse) friends in a herd and is a part of student labs, classes and programs.

title: Taylor Made
description: "Taylor"  Taylor is half-Arabian and half- Quarter Horse, which is how she gets her unique buckskin coloring. Taylor’s sweet and soulful demeanor has helped make her an integral part of all the hands-on learning opportunities here at the AHC.

title: Communities

title: Coastal Sage Scrub

title: Walnut Woodland
